choose.when: select id, customer_code, customer_name, contact_name, contact_phone, province, city, address, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted0 as deleted_marker from logistics_customer

select id, order_no, customer_id, route_id, warehouse_id, vehicle_id, driver_id, customer_name, sender_address, receiver_address, cargo_name, cargo_weight, cargo_volume, status, planned_pickup_time, planned_delivery_time, created_at, updated_at, deleted0 as deleted_marker from logistics_order

select w.id, w.waybill_no, w.order_id, o.order_no, w.start_site, w.target_site, w.current_location, w.transport_status, w.create_time, w.update_time, w.deleted0 as deleted_marker from logistics_waybill w join logistics_order o on o.id = w.order_id

select d.id, d.order_id, o.order_no, d.waybill_id, w.waybill_no, d.driver_id, dr.driver_name, d.vehicle_id, v.vehicle_no, d.start_site, d.target_site, d.planned_departure_time, d.planned_arrival_time, d.dispatch_status, d.create_time, d.update_time, d.deleted0 as deleted_marker from logistics_dispatch d join logistics_order o on o.id = d.order_id join logistics_waybill w on w.id = d.waybill_id join logistics_driver dr on dr.id = d.driver_id join logistics_vehicle v on v.id = d.vehicle_id

select t.id, t.task_no, t.order_id, o.order_no, t.waybill_id, t.dispatch_id, t.driver_id, dr.driver_name, t.vehicle_id, v.vehicle_no, t.task_status, t.proof_url, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.deleted0 as deleted_marker from logistics_task t join logistics_order o on o.id = t.order_id join logistics_driver dr on dr.id = t.driver_id join logistics_vehicle v on v.id = t.vehicle_id

select tr.id, tr.order_id, o.order_no, tr.waybill_id, w.waybill_no, tr.current_status, tr.current_location, tr.operator_name, tr.operation_desc, tr.operation_time, tr.deleted0 as deleted_marker from logistics_track tr join logistics_order o on o.id = tr.order_id join logistics_waybill w on w.id = tr.waybill_id
select id, driver_code, driver_name, phone, license_no, license_type, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted0 as deleted_marker from logistics_driver
select id, vehicle_no, vehicle_type, load_capacity_kg, volume_capacity_cubic, current_city, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted0 as deleted_marker from logistics_vehicle

select e.id, e.order_id, o.order_no, e.task_id, e.exception_type, e.exception_desc, e.exception_status, coalesce(ru.username, e.report_user) as report_user, e.report_time, coalesce(hu.username, e.handle_user) as handle_user, e.handle_time, e.deleted0 as deleted_marker from logistics_exception e join logistics_order o on o.id = e.order_id left join sys_user ru on concat('', ru.id) = e.report_user left join sys_user hu on concat('', hu.id) = e.handle_user

select f.id, f.order_id, o.order_no, f.base_fee, f.weight_fee, f.distance_fee, f.additional_fee, f.discount_fee, f.payable_fee, f.actual_fee, f.payment_status, f.create_time, f.update_time, f.deleted0 as deleted_marker from logistics_fee f join logistics_order o on o.id = f.order_id

select u.id, u.user_codeconcat('U-', u.id) as user_code, u.username, u.real_name, u.mobile, u.email, u.password, u.role_id, r.role_name, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.deleted0 as deleted_marker from sys_user u left join sys_role r on r.id = u.role_id
select id, role_code, role_name, status, create_time, update_time, deleted0 as deleted_marker from sys_role

select id, operation_idnull as operation_id, trace_idnull as trace_id, user_idnull as user_id, user_codenull as user_code, username, role_codenull as role_code, operation, request_uri, request_method, operation_status, cost_msnull as cost_ms, operation_time, 0 as deleted_marker from sys_operation_log
select id, original_name, relative_path, file_size, content_type, upload_user, upload_time, 0 as deleted_marker from sys_uploaded_file
